allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "--- health ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/api/health -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "`n--- categories ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/api/categories -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "`n--- stores ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/api/stores -UseBasicParsing\).Content)

PowerShell(Write-Host "--- products \(page 1\) ---"; $r = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/products; Write-Host "count=$\($r.count\)"; $r.results | Select-Object -First 3 | Format-List sku, name, brand, price, in_stock; Write-Host "--- suggest 'arroz' ---"; Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/search/suggest?q=arroz" | Format-Table name, price)

PowerShell(Write-Host "--- frontend HTML ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:4200/ -UseBasicParsing\).Content.Substring\(0, 600\); Write-Host "`n`n--- frontend proxy /api/health ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:4200/api/health -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "`n--- frontend proxy /api/categories ---"; \(\(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:4200/api/categories -UseBasicParsing\).Content.Substring\(0, 200\)\))

PowerShell(Write-Host "--- HTML root ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:4200/ -UseBasicParsing\).Content.Substring\(0, 500\); Write-Host "`n--- proxy /api/categories ---"; \(\(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:4200/api/categories -UseBasicParsing\).Content.Substring\(0, 150\)\))
